positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
1. superhero_movie(su_adv) [input(axiom)]
2. named_after(su_adv,sir_digby) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0,X1] : ((named_after(X0,X1) & superhero_movie(X0)) => good_guy(X1)) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (good_guy(X0) => win(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0,X1] : ((win(X0) & fight(X0,X1)) => ~win(X1)) [input(axiom)]
6. fight(sir_digby,nemesis) [input(axiom)]
7. ~win(nemesis) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~~win(nemesis) [negated conjecture 7]
9. win(nemesis) [flattening 8]
10. ! [X0,X1] : (good_guy(X1) | (~named_after(X0,X1) | ~superhero_movie(X0))) [ennf transformation 3]
11. ! [X0,X1] : (good_guy(X1) | ~named_after(X0,X1) | ~superhero_movie(X0)) [flattening 10]
12. ! [X0] : (win(X0) | ~good_guy(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
13. ! [X0,X1] : (~win(X1) | (~win(X0) | ~fight(X0,X1))) [ennf transformation 5]
14. ! [X0,X1] : (~win(X1) | ~win(X0) | ~fight(X0,X1)) [flattening 13]
15. superhero_movie(su_adv) [cnf transformation 1]
16. named_after(su_adv,sir_digby) [cnf transformation 2]
17. ~named_after(X0,X1) | good_guy(X1) | ~superhero_movie(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
18. ~good_guy(X0) | win(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. ~fight(X0,X1) | ~win(X0) | ~win(X1) [cnf transformation 14]
20. fight(sir_digby,nemesis) [cnf transformation 6]
21. win(nemesis) [cnf transformation 9]
22. good_guy(sir_digby) | ~superhero_movie(su_adv) [resolution 17,16]
23. good_guy(sir_digby) [forward subsumption resolution 22,15]
24. win(sir_digby) [resolution 23,18]
25. ~win(sir_digby) | ~win(nemesis) [resolution 19,20]
26. ~win(nemesis) [forward subsumption resolution 25,24]
27. $false [forward subsumption resolution 26,21]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
